title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures code mergeability and production-quality of AI-generated code by using blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics. The benchmark covers 36 flagship open-source repositories across multiple programming languages and reports lower false positive rates than SWE-Bench Pro.
